Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust And Validity Of Trust Amendment; And To Determine Validity Fo Transfer To Transferee; Etc.
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for Jeffry Sloan and Patrick Richardson (Trustees/Petitioners).

The Court stated that it received the Memorandum of Points and Authorities. Ms. Zacherin presented further oral argument to support her position. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Construction of Trust and Validity of Trust Amendment, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse.

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust And Validity Of Trust Amendment; And To Determine Validity Fo Transfer To Transferee; Etc.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Continued To May-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deena Zacharin for and with Patrick Richardson.

Ms. Zacharin presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the letter dated June 22, 2011 as the third amendment to the fourth amended and restated trust agreement. The Court expressed its concerns, stated that its position is to deny the petition without prejudice or that is can continue it for counsel to provide more authority. Ms. Zacaharin opted to a continuance. The Petition to determine construction of trust, etc. is continued to May 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust And Validity Of Trust Amendment; And To Determine Validity Fo Transfer To Transferee; Etc.
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
